specs.title: customer is redirected away from admin route @critical @regression @auth
valid user can log in and reach the storefront @critical @smoke @auth
invalid credentials are rejected with an error message @critical @regression @auth
authenticated user can add a product to cart from product details @critical @smoke @cart
user can update quantity and clear cart @critical @regression @cart
rapid double add keeps cart state consistent for the same product @critical @regression @cart

annotations.description: Authenticated customer double-clicks Add on the same supplier offer for product 101
Cart records two units of the same product without a UI crash or duplicate supplier groups
Authenticated customer double-clicks Add on the same supplier offer for product 101

specs.title: catalog renders products and applies search filters @critical @smoke @catalog
user can open product details from the catalog @critical @regression @catalog
special characters search returns an empty-state instead of crashing @critical @regression @catalog

annotations.description: Search query with special characters only: <script>alert(1)</script>
Catalog stays responsive and shows the empty-state message for no matching products

specs.title: extreme price filter yields no results and keeps the filter state visible @critical @regression @catalog

empty cart cannot generate a payment link even when an address exists @critical @regression @checkout

Checkout flow rejects the action with an invalid cart message

specs.title: empty address fields are blocked before checkout submission @critical @regression @checkout

annotations.description: Authenticated customer tries to save a new address with blank description and street

specs.title: orders page shows created order details and supports cancellation @critical @smoke @orders

Order ends in Cancelled state without duplicate rows or a broken detail page
